title: One Doctor. The Whole Picture.
subtitle: "In a system where patients often juggle multiple specialists who do not coordinate, Full Circle introduces the USA Primary Care Physician concept."

features.title: Medically
features.description: A clinical expert managing general medicine, nephrology, and transplant needs with USA-standard protocols and evidence-based rigor.

features.title: Spiritually
features.description: A guide who understands how your Doshas (Vata, Pitta, Kapha) and stress patterns influence physical pathology and subtle energetic balance.

features.title: Aesthetically
features.description: Preventive and regenerative care to ensure your external vitality matches your internal health, creating a complete harmony of form.
